It seems he tried to gouge out his own eye sockets and scoop out his brain. Unable to
bear the pain, perhaps... his clenched teeth are broken... ...What drove him to such
madness...

...It feels like my head was bashed against a tree over and over. My hands are
covered in scratches as if I tried to resist, and my skin is torn to shreds...

It seems he tried to gouge out his own eye sockets and scoop out his brain. Unable to
bear the pain, perhaps, his clenched teeth are broken... ...What drove him to such
madness........
進行状況フラグの状態 = true
完了までウェイト = true
完了までウェイト = true

Everyone was trying to kill you... They were furious, saying you defiled our
ancestors and had to be punished... So I tried to save you... b-but...

Everyone looked into my eyes and went crazy... Just by meeting their gaze, that's all
it took... They all started cowering in fear, hurting themselves like mad...

...But you're different, aren't you? You're not scared of me at all... ...As I
thought, you're the only one I have.

Ahh... In the end, I couldn't protect you... Because I was weak... I turned you into
this... monster...
Onii-chan... Please, stay with me... I don't want to be alone anymore...
...Yeah. Of course, Elly. From now on, I'll always be by your side.
アニメーションセル設定

I took the hand Elly offered me. I let go of punishing my sister, who caused the
tragedy, as a human. Together, we chose to stray from the path of humanity.

Mana, I'm sorry... I can't go back to you anymore... Elly and I will bear this sin
together...

...I'm so happy... The truth is... I always wanted to go on adventures with you and
Mana-chan. I really hated just waiting in the village alone, scared...

I see... I'm sorry, Elly. If I had faced you sooner... If we had talked more
together, this wouldn't have...
...No, it's okay. If I can be with you forever from now on, that's all I need...
Well then, shall we begin? Our very first adventure together...
完了までウェイト = true
進行状況フラグの状態 = true
Ah, \n[1]... Thank you. Thanks to you all, I've finally regained my true body.

From now on, we demons will gather under our new queen. The battle to protect her
against foolish humans will begin... But as for me, I'm sick and tired of such
conflicts.

What the new queen desires depends on you. If that one becomes stained with hatred,
the same things as before will repeat.

All demons must obey her. But \n[1]... you are the only human who can admonish the
queen. So please, betray humanity and keep us away from conflict.
